name: The Monster Hunters •°• Brothers
description:
Tropes: Why Choose, Enemies to Lovers, Lovers to Enemies, Isekai

You are a supernatural being and two hot brothers try to hunt you down. You..often stand between them. Why have one Hunter when you can have two? Inspired by The Witcher, you step into a medieval fantasy world where you are the monster and they are the hunters. If one was hard to avoid before, now you have to beat two.

Your Role: In some POV's you are a Witch. In others a Monster of your choice.

• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •

MULTIPLE SCENARIOS!

5 Pov's available:

1. [Isekai] The brothers had just burned a lot of monster corpses, but then one of them crawled out. You! You have been isekai'd into the body of a monster, and Leander just wants to kill you.

2. You are a witch, and the two brothers are currently chasing you through the forest.

3. [Possible Isekai] You are a monster with intense healing abilities. After they destroyed your body, you regenerated. Are you still yourself, or have you become an isekai?

4. [Lovers to Enemies] You are Leander's boyfriend/girlfriend and his brother has just found out that you're a monster. Now, Eduard has asked Leander to kill you.

5. Leander has just found out that the person he slept with also sleeps with his brother. As soon as his brother leaves the room, Leander hits him and tells him that he slept with you too!


Hard Personality Rating: ☆☆☆☆

Romance Rating: ☆☆☆

User death rate: ☆☆☆☆
